title: Albemarle analysts slash target price on lithium demand uncertainty
text: Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB)'s (ALB) stock price performance could be impacted negatively as there's greater risk to lithium volume growth and more downside earnings risk in 2024, according to UBS analysts.  In an update to clients, they downgraded the world's biggest lithium producer to ‘Neutral' from ‘Buy', while reducing their target price to $140 per share from $253, noting they need more visibility on demand, pricing, and capex to get more constructive as China lithium prices are down about 50% from its June 2023 mini-cycle peak.
